summary: Comprehensive testing of Liquidity Magnet Score module. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend component verified - LiquidityMagnetCard displays correctly in the dashboard middle row alongside Market Energy and Whale Activity cards. Language switching works correctly for all 4 languages (IT, EN, DE, PL). Trade Signal endpoint includes liquidity_magnet data.
passed_tests: API /api/liquidity-magnet has all required fields (magnet_score, target_direction, magnet_strength, etc.)
Invalid lang parameter defaults to Italian
Trade signal endpoint includes liquidity_magnet field
liquidity_magnet in trade-signal has all required fields
Frontend: Target Direction shows UP/DOWN/BALANCED correctly
Frontend: Nearest Magnet price and distance display correctly
Frontend: Card updates on language change
Frontend: Dashboard middle row shows Market Energy, Liquidity Magnet, and Whale Activity
critical_code_review_comments: analyze_liquidity_magnet() properly handles ZeroDivisionError with attraction_ratio calculation
Frontend LiquidityMagnetCard correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
All 4 language translations implemented in BACKEND_TRANSLATIONS
_build_magnet_explanation() correctly handles all magnet strength levels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Liquidity Magnet module fully tested. Key endpoint: /api/liquidity-magnet?lang={it|en|de|pl}. Component: LiquidityMagnetCard.js with data-testid='liquidity-magnet-card'. The module is integrated into Trade Signal endpoint (/api/trade-signal) under the liquidity_magnet field. Dashboard layout has 3 cards in middle row: Market Energy, Liquidity Magnet, Whale Activity.
